Post

Welcome to Cygnos

Posted Apr 15, 2026
By Cygnos
1 min read

Welcome

This is Cygnos — a bilingual space for offensive security research, AI red teaming, and practical technology insights.

What you’ll find here

  • Offensive Security: Active Directory attacks, web application pentesting, red team operations
  • AI Security: Prompt injection, LLM red teaming, adversarial machine learning
  • Tools & Techniques: Practical writeups, tool reviews, methodology discussions

Why bilingual

Content will be published in both English and Spanish to serve the global security community and the Latin American audience.

Stay tuned for the first technical posts.
